message:
feat(engine): add deep enrichment tests for hostcall channel and synthesis pipeline

Add 165 new integration tests across two modules:

- session_hostcall_channel (78 tests): backpressure signal verification,
  expired/closed state transitions, interleaved payload types, stress
  testing (500 msgs, 50 sessions), nonce derivation, AEAD associated
  data, serde round-trips, error/type traits, session lifecycle

- offline_synthesis_pipeline (87 tests): automaton lifecycle traversal,
  multi-guard transitions, constraint tightening edge cases, negative
  coefficients, multiple objectives/safety specs, threshold calibration,
  certificate obligations, budget-limited pipeline, determinism, full
  serde round-trip, guard priority resolution, mixed variable domains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
